title: Security Policy
description: Configure security policies for this team. Password strength rules block form submission when violated.
allowExportHelp: Allow team members to export team data
allowSharingHelp: Allow team members to create share links for team passwords
maxSessionDurationHelp: Deprecated. Use session idle/absolute timeouts below.
sessionIdleTimeoutHelp: Leave blank to inherit tenant. Must be <= tenant value (max 1440 = 24h).
sessionAbsoluteTimeoutHelp: Leave blank to inherit tenant. Must be <= tenant value (max 43200 = 30d).
requireRepromptForAll: Require master password re-prompt for all entries
requireRepromptForAllHelp: All team entries will require passphrase confirmation before viewing
passwordHistoryCountHelp: Number of previous passwords to check for reuse before saving. Comparison is done client-side before encryption (0 = disabled, max 24).
inheritTenantCidrsHelp: Apply the tenant-level IP restrictions to this team in addition to any team-specific CIDRs
teamAllowedCidrsHelp: Additional CIDR ranges allowed for this team (one per line, max {max}). Leave empty to rely solely on tenant restrictions.
policyBlocked: Password does not meet team policy requirements
